{{Quote|Send out the bugle boy…it is time!|Lord Hoth|<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith 3">[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]]</ref>}}
The '''bugle boy''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] recruited into the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] was recruited into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the final decade of the [[New Sith Wars]]. Charged with sounding the war bugle to rouse the Army for battle, the young boy served under [[Jedi Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] during the [[Ruusan campaign]] following the declaration of support from the [[Jedi Grand Council]].<ref name="JvS" />

[[File:Bugleboysdeath_jvs4.jpg|left|thumb|The bugle boy lays dead on the battle field.]]

During the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], the bugle boy joined in the company of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Kiel Charny]] when the group of Jedi and loyal soldiers confronted the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] in open combat. During the fighting, the Sith used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to destroy the forest surrounding the battlefield, leveling the Charny's forces. During the fighting, the unarmed bugle boy was slain and his body left broken on the field of battle.<ref name="JvS" />

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]]
